title: Paper-23: FoldForge Protein Folding
abstract: FoldForge, protein descriptor, residue windows, contact map, candidate bifurcation, bounded winding witness

D_claims.claim: - Claim 23.1 [D]: Residue chain reads as local (L, C, R) windows.
Claim 23.3 [D]: Candidate bifurcation marks at local side-changes.
Claim 23.4 [D]: Bounded winding witness (8-state operator, gap-aware).
